title: gandola nigra
intro: Gandola nigra, also known as Sambucus nigra, is a flowering shrub native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, with its dark purple berries and fragrant flowers used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of gandola nigra include its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of gandola nigra include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of gandola nigra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
